/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/include -DVERSION_INFO=\"0.0.1\" -O3  -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/lib -L/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/lib -shared  -o /home/cg/FontCLIP/diffvg/build/lib.linux-x86_64-cpython-39/diffvg.so CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/atomic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/parallel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/diffvg_generated_diffvg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/diffvg.dir/diffvg_generated_scene.cpp.o   -L/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/lib/libcudart_static.a  -L/home/cg/FontCLIP/diffvg/Threads::Threads  -L/home/cg/FontCLIP/diffvg/dl  -L/home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/lib/librt.a  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" /home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/lib/libcudart_static.a -ldl /home/cg/miniconda3/envs/fontclip/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/lib/librt.a
